reviews.review_description: I love the realistic marble look.
Oddly satisfying indeed.  I just love great free software😊makes me happy.

developer_response.body: Thank you and please keep your eyes open for our upcoming new product releases.
Please accept our deepest gratitude. We are joyfully pleased to hear that you are enjoying spring.

reviews.review_description: Nothing makes me happier than coming home from a long night of work than to wind down and this does it!  Vibrant colors that don't hurt the eyes and soft sounds that are pleasing to listen to.  Not to mention being able to solve the puzzles however you please.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sending us your feedback. Nothing is more pleasing than hearing that you are enjoying the experience. Our aim is to deliver a positive environment for contemplation and thinking. They say that the best ideas come during shower. We think  Spring can play a part in the way we arrive to ideas.

reviews.review_title: A very oddly satisfying non game
reviews.review_description: Just download it. It’s as complex as you want it to be…or not….oddly satisfying….

developer_response.body: You are great Wareix. We aim to please and it’s great when we hit the spot. Stay tuned for our new updates.

reviews.review_title: Another App Lab gem. Devs, please read.
reviews.review_description: The only way to improve this would be to change the textures/graphics of the "marble" blocks into a perfect cube of liquid mercury, a la the blob/stars. Other than that I think this stunning casual puzzler is perfect.

I enjoy this game its fun and any age can do it. The only frustration I have with it is when you try to adjust a piece and you let it go and pick it back up again, when you pick it back up it defaults to an angle that it wasnt in before. So you might have almost had it right and then when you try to get it JUST right you gotta start from scratch again with the new angle. Hope this helps!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your insight Cookiecupcakes. Will add your suggestion to the next product update.
